memory.summary: My plan to finish the assignment analysis and reading immediately is interrupted by cohort_3's lunch invitation. Prioritizing this social connection aligns with my high value on relationships, though I must renegotiate my task timeline.

desires: To renegotiate my assignment deadline with prof_assignment without appearing flaky, since I owe it to myself and the team to deliver quality work on time.
To fully immerse in lunch with cohort_3 today so that the relationship capital doesn't erode while I'm still recovering from last night's sleep debt.
To avoid the crushing exhaustion of tomorrow morning by forcing myself to rest now, even though finishing the reading would feel productive.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately to solidify relationship capital before the sleep debt worsens my ability to connect.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) outweighs immediate academic output; I am already at full capacity on coursework, and social erosion is a tangible risk right now.

goals.description: Initiate a direct conversation with prof_assignment regarding the assignment timeline to ensure quality delivery without appearing unreliable.
goals.rationale: Assertiveness requires a clear mind; attempting this while sleep-deprived risks sounding flaky. It must wait until after I recharge or once I've confirmed my energy levels post-lunch.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm already at full capacity on coursework; pushing through now risks sleep debt eroding my ability to connect. Joining cohort_3 solidifies relationship capital (0.5 priority) before stress spikes. I'll propose a boundary later if needed, but presence matters most right now.
